mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge_participants (challenge_id, user_id, status) VALUES (#{challengeId}, #{userId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT p.user_id, u.nickname, p.status, p.joined_at FROM challenge_participants p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.joined_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT user_id FROM challenge_participants WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, COUNT(cp.id) FILTER (WHERE cp.certification_status = 'APPROVED' AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL) AS approved_count FROM challenge_participants p LEFT JOIN certification_posts cp ON cp.challenge_participant_id = p.id WHERE p.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY p.id, p.user_id

SELECT p.user_id, u.nickname, p.joined_at, COUNT(DISTINCT (cp.created_at::date)) FILTER (WHERE cp.certification_status = 'APPROVED' AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL) AS approved_days, COUNT(cp.id) FILTER (WHERE cp.certification_status = 'PENDING' AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL) AS pending_count FROM challenge_participants p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN certification_posts cp ON cp.challenge_participant_id = p.id WHERE p.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY p.user_id, u.nickname, p.joined_at ORDER BY p.joined_at ASC
